title: spermacoce manillensis
intro: Spermacoce manillensis, also known as Manilla buttonbush or Manilla buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Spermacoce manillensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
